name: spotify-recently-played
description: Get the user's recently played Spotify tracks with timestamps. Use for questions like 'what have I been listening to?', 'what did I play recently?', 'what was I listening to this morning?', 'show my recent listening history'. Returns up to 50 of the most recently played tracks.

input.description: Query parameters: limit (1-50, default 20). Returns tracks played most recently first.

output.description: Response with items array. Each item has track (name, artists, album) and played_at (ISO 8601 timestamp).
